Manual agent controls are now re-integrated, and time-since-last-message is displayed in the chat header. The checklist has been completed, resulting in a fully runnable and unified code.


**Restoring All the Features**

I'm now integrating all the key features requested. My focus is on ensuring a unified and fully operational code. The time-since-last-message display is working, completing the UI enhancements. The checklist is now completed, and I'm ensuring everything runs together seamlessly!
